title: Landslide
why_this_song: Reflective past and present simple contrasting — 'Well, I've been afraid of changing'. Great for introducing present perfect continuous.

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:
exercises.excerpt_after: a mountain and I turned around

exercises.excerpt: Well, I've been afraid of changin'
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Landslide" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Landslide" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.excerpt_after: my love, I took it down

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "landslide" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "landslide" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I took my love, I took it down
Well, I've been afraid of changin'

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Slow acoustic performance makes every word audible. Lyrics are introspective — great for pair discussion about growing up.
copyright_notice: Lyrics are property of Warner Chappell Music. Only short educational excerpts reproduced here under Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII and US fair-use doctrine.

lines: Well, I've been afraid of changin'
'Cause I've built my life around you
Well, the landslide bring it down
And if you see my reflection in the snow-covered hills
Well, the landslide bring it down
Oh-ohh, the landslide bring it down
